project.name: camlhmp
project.description: Classification through yAML Heuristic Mapping Protocol

camlhmp-blast-alleles.description: Classify assemblies using BLAST against alleles of a set of genes

camlhmp-blast-regions.description: Classify assemblies using BLAST against larger genomic regions

camlhmp-blast-targets.description: Classify assemblies using BLAST against individual genes or proteins

camlhmp-extract.description: Extract typing targets from a set of reference sequences

functions.name: read_framework
functions.description: Read the framework YAML file.

functions.name: print_camlhmp_version
functions.description: Print the version of camlhmp, then exit

functions.name: print_version
functions.description: Print the version of the framework, then exit

functions.name: print_versions
functions.description: Print the version of the framework, then exit

functions.name: get_types
functions.description: Get the types from the framework.

functions.name: check_types
functions.description: Check the types against the results.

functions.name: check_regions
functions.description: Check the region types against the results.

functions.name: run_blast
functions.description: Query sequences against a input subject using a specified BLAST+ algorithm.

functions.name: run_blastn
functions.description: An alias for `run_blast` which uses `blastn`

functions.name: run_tblastn
functions.description: An alias for `run_blast` which uses `tblastn`.

functions.name: get_blast_allele_hits
functions.description: Find the allele hits in the BLAST results.

functions.name: get_blast_region_hits
functions.description: Aggregate multiple target hits for a region from the BLAST results.

functions.name: get_blast_target_hits
functions.description: Find the target hits in the BLAST results.

functions.name: finalize_regions
functions.description: Finalize the results from region-based analysis.

functions.name: finalize_targets
functions.description: Finalize the target hits.

functions.name: execute
functions.description: A simple wrapper around executor.

functions.name: check_dependencies
functions.description: Check if all dependencies are installed.

functions.name: get_platform
functions.description: Get the platform of the executing machine

functions.name: validate_file
functions.description: Validate a file exists and not empty, if passing return the absolute path

functions.name: validate_engine
functions.description: Validate the engine is in the accepted list.

functions.name: file_exists_error
functions.description: Determine if a file exists and raise an error if it does.

functions.name: parse_seq
functions.description: Parse a sequence file containing a single record.

functions.name: parse_seqs
functions.description: Parse a sequence file containing a multiple records.

functions.name: parse_seq_lengths
functions.description: Parse a sequence file and return the lengths of the sequences.

functions.name: parse_table
functions.description: Parse a delimited file.

functions.name: parse_yaml
functions.description: Parse a YAML file.

functions.name: write_tsv
functions.description: Write the dictionary to a TSV file.

functions.name: remove_lowercase
functions.description: Remove lowercase characters from a string.

functions.name: describe_framework
functions.description: Print the framework YAML file.

blast.description: BLAST+ sequence search via shell pipe

classification_modes.alleles: Per-gene allele classification (exact match vs novel variant)
classification_modes.regions: Coverage-based classification aggregating multiple HSPs across a region
classification_modes.targets: Binary presence/absence of individual gene or protein targets

metadata.description: General information about the typing schema

engine.description: Computational tool and default parameters for analysis

targets.description: List of sequence targets (genes, proteins, markers) to analyze

aliases.description: Groups of targets under a common name for easier reference

types.description: Combinations of targets/aliases that define distinct types

available_tools.name: pasty
available_tools.description: in silico serogrouping of Pseudomonas aeruginosa isolates

available_tools.name: pbptyper
available_tools.description: In silico Penicillin Binding Protein (PBP) typer for Streptococcus pneumoniae assemblies

available_tools.name: sccmec
available_tools.description: A tool for typing SCCmec cassettes in assemblies
